summary: The diff implements both REQ-7 and REQ-8 comprehensively. REQ-7 is addressed by stripping decorative elements (scanlines, gauge widgets, grid overlays, corner brackets, vignette) from HUDLayout, removing military jargon labels, preserving the dark palette, and restructuring the app to fit within a single mobile viewport. REQ-8 is addressed by refactoring RadarWidget to accept a playbackState prop, varying sweep speed by state, showing blips only during playing/loading, displaying a static error state, and embedding it compactly (36px default) in the AppHeader. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the available diff evidence.
